name: Chicken Tortilla Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a Dutch oven, cook onions and garlic in 2 tablespoons oil until onion is tender.
2. Stir in broth, bell pepper, ground red chiles, basil, salt, and pepper. Add tomato puree.
3. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 30 minutes.
4. Heat vegetable oil in a skillet over medium-high heat until hot.
5. Cook tortilla strips in the oil until light golden brown, about 30 to 60 seconds; drain on paper towels.
6. Divide tortilla strips and shredded chicken among 6 bowls.
7. Pour broth over the chicken.
8. Top with cheese (Monterey Jack or Chihuahua) and avocado slices.
